content: This is a unique cooking game that uses potions and a medieval setting instead of the usual restaurant setting. The music is spot on, characters remind me of Gravity Falls animation, the ads are short, and there are lots of opportunities to level up your patrons without spending real money. I like that the characters have little bios, and it's not just grinding. It would be even better if there's a way to remove ads and if we can flick the orders to the characters, but I still enjoy this a lot.
This game is very relaxing and it will surely take you into a fantasy world of magic.✨️
I love this game it brings me comfort and relaxation
it's so fun

i love this game so much omg😣. it's better than expected.

content: Great game, very nice second version of potion punch. Sweet, simple and entertaining. Very little ads to unless you decide to watch them. A great download .

Thought this was going to be a typical time management/cooking game, tried it since the art style reminded me of Gravity Falls (which I adore). Turns out, it's quirky, it's breezy fun, with lots of variety! Love the graphics, love that each new "restaurant" is a new theme + new items to make. Patrons are fun to collect!! Plus ads are minimal, and/or optional. I actually spent money on some booster packs, and I NEVER do that with games, EVER. But I am having so much fun that I WANTED to pay!! :)

Brilliant game. Bite size story line adding to immersion. Easy progress. No force to pay. Range of price packages. Watch ad option for resources. Occasional Ad pop ups but skipable. Each location starts gentle then ramps up the challenge but still easily achievable. Keeps you coming back for more as progress is steady and satisfying. All round a fun game! Thanks devs :)

content: With the state of the mobile game industry, I can't in good conscience give this anything less than five stars. content: I really like this game as well as the first one. However, I'm on the forge level right now, and a lot of the hitboxes are very finicky. The screen is so cramped with so many things I need to click and drag that it's difficult to drag the item. Often with the cross guards I'll pick one up and try to drag it to the blade and it will get dropped multiple times because I accidentally drag it over another bin or something. Which I need to do in order to avoid dragging it onto the wrong blade. I do love this app but I'm experiencing a lot of frustration on this level and I really feel like something could be done to improve this. EDIT: Editing to add I also found what I think is a bug or oversight. On the level where you're introduced to the jack-in-the-box guys who change customers' orders, the tutorial popup disables all your workers I think, which led to my gem smelter unavoidably eating the gem...I think if the tutorial popup paused everything including smelters then that would fix it.

I love the game itself. It has a nice art style, smooth play, balanced challenge, fun characters, and a satisfying upgrade pace. However, it crashes pretty often--sometimes repeatedly, sometimes just once. And the ads... oof. I appreciate that there's an ads-for-rewards option, like for extra mana, a different daily gift, or an alternate daily challenge. Wish there was a little more variety, but my real frustration is with the additional popup ads. There aren't a lot of those, but it adds up.

I do the dailies every day and just play it because I like it, not because I feel obliged to!

content: Fantastic game! Unlike other games, nothing is hidden behind a paywall. Energy use is optional, so there's no limit to how many levels you can play, and the currencies in the game are easy enough to come by that you can get through the whole game without feeling like you have to spend money. My only warning is this game is VERY fast paced, probably not for people looking for a more leisurely experience. Other than that, this is definitely a shining example of what phone games should be!

In this version everything happens so fast and you don't have time to get used to everything and that makes it really hard to achieve 3 stars. Other than that it's really great.

content: Decent game if you liked potion punch 2. Unfortunately you only get to play the first area then the next is locked behind a steep $20 paywall requiring you to have 25k coins which is over 400 gems. 500 gems = $18.99. Too bad. UPDATE: Endless mode, as long as shop upgrades are adequate can easily net you 500 coins. Considering you can double your coins 5times/day, you can get 5,000c/day. So you can unlock chapter 2 after 5 days. Not bad, but not as good as potion punch 1. Updating to 3 stars.
replyContent:
Hi James!

Thanks for reaching out. We'll look into the possibility of adjusting our prices. For now, we recommend replaying the old levels or earning more gold by playing Endless Mode. This can help you earn gold quickly.
